shellCommands.command:
set -e
cd /home/user/workspace
mkdir -p vectorops/vectorops dist packages .pypi-server-log
cat > vectorops/pyproject.toml <<'EOF'
[build-system]
requires = ["setuptools>=68", "wheel"]
build-backend = "setuptools.build_meta"

[project]
name = "vectorops"
version = "0.1.0"
description = "Simple vector operations package"
readme = "README.md"
requires-python = ">=3.8"
authors = [
  { name = "OpenAI" }
]

[tool.setuptools]
package-dir = {"" = "."}

[tool.setuptools.packages.find]
where = ["."]
include = ["vectorops"]
EOF
cat > vectorops/README.md <<'EOF'
# vectorops

A minimal Python package providing vector operations.
EOF
cat > vectorops/vectorops/__init__.py <<'EOF'
from .core import dotproduct

__all__ = ["dotproduct"]
EOF
cat > vectorops/vectorops/core.py <<'EOF'
from typing import Iterable


def dotproduct(a: list[float | int], b: list[float | int]) -> float | int:
    if len(a) != len(b):
        raise ValueError("Vectors must have the same length")
    return sum(x * y for x, y in zip(a, b))
EOF
python3 -m venv .venv-vectorops
. .venv-vectorops/bin/activate
python -m pip install --upgrade pip build pypiserver
cd vectorops
python -m build
cp dist/* /home/user/workspace/packages/

set -e
cd /home/user/workspace
cat > serve-pypi.sh <<'EOF'
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
cd /home/user/workspace
exec /home/user/workspace/.venv-vectorops/bin/pypi-server run -p 8080 /home/user/workspace/packages
EOF
chmod +x serve-pypi.sh
if [ -f .pypi-server.pid ] && kill -0 "$(cat .pypi-server.pid)" 2>/dev/null; then
  kill "$(cat .pypi-server.pid)" || true
  sleep 1
fi
nohup /home/user/workspace/serve-pypi.sh > /home/user/workspace/.pypi-server.log 2>&1 &
echo $! > /home/user/workspace/.pypi-server.pid
sleep 3
curl -fsS http://localhost:8080/simple/ > /tmp/pypi_index.html
python3 -m venv /home/user/workspace/.venv-test-install
. /home/user/workspace/.venv-test-install/bin/activate
pip install --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0
python - <<'EOF'
from vectorops import dotproduct
assert 1 == dotproduct([1,1], [0,1])
print('dotproduct ok')
EOF
cd /home/user/workspace
npm run build

set -e
if [ -f /home/user/workspace/.pypi-server.pid ]; then
  PID=$(cat /home/user/workspace/.pypi-server.pid)
  kill -0 "$PID" 2>/dev/null
fi
cd /home/user/workspace
npm run build
